source: IBM Bobathon 2025 — EcoComply real hackathon dataset (regulatory_updates.json)

regulations.title: RoHS heavy-metal limits review (Pb, Hg, Cd, Cr VI)
regulations.short_name: RoHS — RoHS heavy-metal limits review (Pb, Hg,
regulations.summary: The Commission has reopened the Annex II review for the four restricted heavy metals. Several lighting and legacy-electronics exemptions for lead and mercury are set to lapse, meaning equipment containing these metals above 0.1% (0.01% for cadmium) must be reformulated or pulled from the EU market.
regulations.what_changed: The Commission has reopened the Annex II review for the four restricted heavy metals. Several lighting and legacy-electronics exemptions for lead and mercury are set to lapse, meaning equipment containing these metals above 0.1% (0.01% for cadmium) must be reformulated or pulled from the EU market.
required_actions: Confirm homogeneous-material content of Pb/Hg/Cd/Cr VI; re-test affected SKUs.
regulations.fines: National penalties apply; market access restrictions for non-compliance
regulations.scope_conditions: Applies to EEE placed on the EU market containing the listed heavy metals above threshold.

regulations.title: RoHS to restrict medium-chain chlorinated paraffins (MCCP)
regulations.short_name: RoHS — RoHS to restrict medium-chain chlorinate
regulations.summary: MCCPs used as plasticisers/flame retardants in cabling and insulation are proposed for addition to the RoHS restricted list.
regulations.what_changed: MCCPs used as plasticisers/flame retardants in cabling and insulation are proposed for addition to the RoHS restricted list.
required_actions: Screen cable insulation and plasticised parts for MCCP.
regulations.fines: National penalties apply; market access restrictions for non-compliance
regulations.scope_conditions: Applies to EEE containing MCCP above the restriction threshold.

regulations.title: RoHS lead exemption renewed for certain medical sensors
regulations.short_name: RoHS — RoHS lead exemption renewed for certain
regulations.summary: Exemption permitting lead in solder of specific in-vivo and body-worn medical sensors is renewed for a further term. Affected manufacturers should re-document the exemption in their technical file.
regulations.what_changed: Exemption permitting lead in solder of specific in-vivo and body-worn medical sensors is renewed for a further term. Affected manufacturers should re-document the exemption in their technical file.
required_actions: Update technical documentation to cite the renewed exemption.
regulations.fines: National penalties apply; market access restrictions for non-compliance
regulations.scope_conditions: Applies to medical EEE relying on the lead-in-solder exemption.

regulations.title: REACH SVHC list adds bisphenol A; reaffirms DEHP
regulations.short_name: REACH — REACH SVHC list adds bisphenol A; reaffi
regulations.summary: Bisphenol A (BPA) is added to the Candidate List of Substances of Very High Concern and DEHP is reaffirmed. Articles containing either above 0.1% w/w trigger SCIP notification and supply-chain communication duties.
regulations.what_changed: Bisphenol A (BPA) is added to the Candidate List of Substances of Very High Concern and DEHP is reaffirmed. Articles containing either above 0.1% w/w trigger SCIP notification and supply-chain communication duties.
required_actions: Run SVHC screening; file SCIP notifications for affected articles.
regulations.fines: National penalties apply; market access restrictions for non-compliance
regulations.scope_conditions: Applies to any article containing BPA or DEHP > 0.1% w/w on the EU market.

regulations.title: REACH SVHC list adds 1,4-dioxane
regulations.short_name: REACH — REACH SVHC list adds 1,4-dioxane
regulations.summary: 1,4-Dioxane is added to the SVHC Candidate List. Producers of articles containing it above 0.1% w/w must notify and inform recipients.
regulations.what_changed: 1,4-Dioxane is added to the SVHC Candidate List. Producers of articles containing it above 0.1% w/w must notify and inform recipients.
required_actions: Confirm absence/presence of 1,4-dioxane in articles.
regulations.fines: National penalties apply; market access restrictions for non-compliance
regulations.scope_conditions: Applies to articles containing 1,4-dioxane > 0.1% w/w (none expected in this portfolio).

regulations.title: REACH restriction on PFHxA in textiles and coatings
regulations.short_name: REACH — REACH restriction on PFHxA in textiles a
regulations.summary: A restriction on PFHxA and related substances targets water-repellent coatings on wearable straps and outdoor electronics housings.
regulations.what_changed: A restriction on PFHxA and related substances targets water-repellent coatings on wearable straps and outdoor electronics housings.
required_actions: Identify PFAS/PFHxA coatings on straps and housings; source alternatives.
regulations.fines: National penalties apply; market access restrictions for non-compliance
regulations.scope_conditions: Applies to wearables and drones with PFHxA-based coatings.

regulations.title: REACH SVHC list adds TBBPA (flame retardant)
regulations.short_name: REACH — REACH SVHC list adds TBBPA (flame retard
regulations.summary: Tetrabromobisphenol A, common on printed circuit boards, is added to the SVHC Candidate List.
regulations.what_changed: Tetrabromobisphenol A, common on printed circuit boards, is added to the SVHC Candidate List.
required_actions: Screen PCBs for TBBPA; prepare SCIP notifications.
regulations.fines: National penalties apply; market access restrictions for non-compliance
regulations.scope_conditions: Applies to networking/IoT equipment with TBBPA-containing boards.

regulations.title: WEEE crossed-out wheelie-bin marking & producer registration update
regulations.short_name: WEEE — WEEE crossed-out wheelie-bin marking & p
regulations.summary: Updated marking and producer-registration obligations apply to all electrical and electronic equipment placed on the EU market.
regulations.what_changed: Updated marking and producer-registration obligations apply to all electrical and electronic equipment placed on the EU market.
required_actions: Verify WEEE marking and national producer registrations.
regulations.fines: National penalties apply; market access restrictions for non-compliance
regulations.scope_conditions: Applies to all EEE on the EU market.

regulations.title: Germany EEE producer registration deadline (ElektroG)
regulations.short_name: WEEE — Germany EEE producer registration deadli
regulations.summary: Producers selling electrical and electronic equipment into the German market must complete or renew their stiftung ear registration before the deadline. Selling without it is prohibited in Germany.
regulations.what_changed: Producers selling electrical and electronic equipment into the German market must complete or renew their stiftung ear registration before the deadline. Selling without it is prohibited in Germany.
required_actions: Confirm German EAR registration for all EEE sold in DE.
regulations.fines: National penalties apply; market access restrictions for non-compliance
regulations.scope_conditions: Applies to EEE sold in Germany (DE) only.

regulations.title: Battery passport required for LMT and industrial (>2 kWh) batteries
regulations.short_name: Battery — Battery passport required for LMT and in
regulations.summary: From the application date, a digital battery passport is mandatory for light-means-of-transport (LMT) batteries and industrial batteries above 2 kWh, as well as EV batteries. Portable consumer batteries are out of scope of the passport requirement.
regulations.what_changed: From the application date, a digital battery passport is mandatory for light-means-of-transport (LMT) batteries and industrial batteries above 2 kWh, as well as EV batteries. Portable consumer batteries are out of scope of the passport requirement.
required_actions: Stand up a battery passport (QR + data carrier) for in-scope batteries.
regulations.fines: National penalties apply; market access restrictions for non-compliance
regulations.scope_conditions: Applies to LMT batteries and industrial batteries; NOT to portable consumer batteries.

regulations.title: Carbon footprint declaration for industrial and EV batteries
regulations.short_name: Battery — Carbon footprint declaration for industr
regulations.summary: Industrial (>2 kWh) and EV batteries must carry a carbon footprint declaration and performance class. LMT batteries follow at a later date.
regulations.what_changed: Industrial (>2 kWh) and EV batteries must carry a carbon footprint declaration and performance class. LMT batteries follow at a later date.
required_actions: Compile life-cycle carbon footprint for industrial battery SKUs.
regulations.fines: National penalties apply; market access restrictions for non-compliance
regulations.scope_conditions: Applies to industrial and EV batteries (LMT later).

regulations.title: Portable batteries must be user-removable and replaceable
regulations.short_name: Battery — Portable batteries must be user-removabl
regulations.summary: Devices powered by portable or button-cell batteries must be designed so that end users can readily remove and replace the battery.
regulations.what_changed: Devices powered by portable or button-cell batteries must be designed so that end users can readily remove and replace the battery.
required_actions: Redesign enclosures for user-replaceable cells; update manuals.
regulations.fines: National penalties apply; market access restrictions for non-compliance
regulations.scope_conditions: Applies to consumer devices with portable or button-cell batteries.

regulations.title: Minimum recycled content for industrial batteries
regulations.short_name: Battery — Minimum recycled content for industrial
regulations.summary: Industrial and EV batteries must document minimum recycled cobalt, lithium and nickel content.
regulations.what_changed: Industrial and EV batteries must document minimum recycled cobalt, lithium and nickel content.
required_actions: Collect recycled-content data from cell suppliers.
regulations.fines: National penalties apply; market access restrictions for non-compliance
regulations.scope_conditions: Applies to industrial and EV batteries.

regulations.title: USB-C common charger mandate for portable electronics
regulations.short_name: RED — USB-C common charger mandate for portabl
regulations.summary: Portable consumer electronics that recharge via a wired cable must use a USB-C receptacle. Devices still shipping with micro-USB or proprietary connectors must transition. The obligation applies at the point of placing on the EU market.
regulations.what_changed: Portable consumer electronics that recharge via a wired cable must use a USB-C receptacle. Devices still shipping with micro-USB or proprietary connectors must transition. The obligation applies at the point of placing on the EU market.
required_actions: Switch wired-charge ports to USB-C across in-scope SKUs.
regulations.fines: National penalties apply; market access restrictions for non-compliance
regulations.scope_conditions: Applies to portable electronics with a wired charging port (USB-C/micro-USB/proprietary).

regulations.title: RED cybersecurity requirements for internet-connected radio equipment
regulations.short_name: RED — RED cybersecurity requirements for inter
regulations.summary: Radio equipment that connects to the internet must meet network-protection, personal-data and fraud-prevention requirements. Conformity via harmonised standard EN 18031.
regulations.what_changed: Radio equipment that connects to the internet must meet network-protection, personal-data and fraud-prevention requirements. Conformity via harmonised standard EN 18031.
required_actions: Assess against EN 18031; update risk assessment and firmware.
regulations.fines: National penalties apply; market access restrictions for non-compliance
regulations.scope_conditions: Applies to radio equipment that is internet-connected.

regulations.title: Updated harmonised standards for short-range devices
regulations.short_name: RED — Updated harmonised standards for short-r
regulations.summary: New harmonised standards are cited for short-range radio devices; presumption of conformity under the previous versions ends after a transition period.
regulations.what_changed: New harmonised standards are cited for short-range radio devices; presumption of conformity under the previous versions ends after a transition period.
required_actions: Re-assess radio test reports against the new standard versions.
regulations.fines: National penalties apply; market access restrictions for non-compliance
regulations.scope_conditions: Applies to radio equipment.

regulations.title: PPWR: recycled content and reduction targets for plastic packaging
regulations.short_name: PPWR — PPWR: recycled content and reduction tar
regulations.summary: Plastic packaging must meet minimum recycled-content thresholds and packaging minimisation rules. Plastic film wraps are a specific focus.
regulations.what_changed: Plastic packaging must meet minimum recycled-content thresholds and packaging minimisation rules. Plastic film wraps are a specific focus.
required_actions: Audit packaging; switch to compliant recycled or reduced formats.
regulations.fines: National penalties apply; market access restrictions for non-compliance
regulations.scope_conditions: Applies to products placed on the EU market using plastic-film packaging.

regulations.title: PPWR: harmonised packaging material labelling
regulations.short_name: PPWR — PPWR: harmonised packaging material labe
regulations.summary: All packaging must carry harmonised material-composition and sorting labels.
regulations.what_changed: All packaging must carry harmonised material-composition and sorting labels.
required_actions: Add harmonised sorting labels to all packaging.
regulations.fines: National penalties apply; market access restrictions for non-compliance
regulations.scope_conditions: Applies to all packaging on the EU market.

regulations.title: GPSR: traceability and economic-operator obligations for consumer products
regulations.short_name: GPSR — GPSR: traceability and economic-operator
regulations.summary: Consumer products need an EU-based responsible economic operator, traceability information and safety documentation. Medical devices and purely industrial equipment follow their own regimes.
regulations.what_changed: Consumer products need an EU-based responsible economic operator, traceability information and safety documentation. Medical devices and purely industrial equipment follow their own regimes.
required_actions: Confirm responsible person, traceability labelling and risk file.
regulations.fines: National penalties apply; market access restrictions for non-compliance
regulations.scope_conditions: Applies to consumer products (excludes medical and industrial-only equipment).

regulations.title: GPSR: child-safety requirements for products with button/coin cells
regulations.short_name: GPSR — GPSR: child-safety requirements for prod
regulations.summary: Products containing button or coin cell batteries must secure the battery compartment against child access and carry specific warnings.
regulations.what_changed: Products containing button or coin cell batteries must secure the battery compartment against child access and carry specific warnings.
required_actions: Add secured compartments and warnings on button-cell products.
regulations.fines: National penalties apply; market access restrictions for non-compliance
regulations.scope_conditions: Applies to any consumer product with a button/coin cell.

regulations.title: ESPR Digital Product Passport pilot for chargers, displays, batteries and networking
regulations.short_name: ESPR — ESPR Digital Product Passport pilot for
regulations.summary: A Digital Product Passport pilot covers external power supplies, displays, standalone batteries and networking equipment, requiring a machine-readable data carrier with material and repair information.
regulations.what_changed: A Digital Product Passport pilot covers external power supplies, displays, standalone batteries and networking equipment, requiring a machine-readable data carrier with material and repair information.
required_actions: Prepare DPP data model and QR data carrier for in-scope categories.
regulations.fines: National penalties apply; market access restrictions for non-compliance
regulations.scope_conditions: Applies to power supplies, displays, battery packs and networking equipment.

regulations.title: Updated ecodesign efficiency for external power supplies
regulations.short_name: ESPR — Updated ecodesign efficiency for externa
regulations.summary: External power supplies must meet revised no-load and active-mode efficiency limits.
regulations.what_changed: External power supplies must meet revised no-load and active-mode efficiency limits.
required_actions: Re-test charger efficiency against new ecodesign limits.
regulations.fines: National penalties apply; market access restrictions for non-compliance
regulations.scope_conditions: Applies to external power supplies.

regulations.title: Energy label rescaling for electronic displays
regulations.short_name: EnergyLabel — Energy label rescaling for electronic di
regulations.summary: Electronic displays move to a rescaled A-G energy label; existing labels and database entries must be updated.
regulations.what_changed: Electronic displays move to a rescaled A-G energy label; existing labels and database entries must be updated.
required_actions: Regenerate energy labels and update EPREL entries for displays.
regulations.fines: National penalties apply; market access restrictions for non-compliance
regulations.scope_conditions: Applies to electronic displays/monitors.

regulations.title: Stricter chemical limits for toys (phthalates, bisphenols)
regulations.short_name: ToySafety — Stricter chemical limits for toys (phtha
regulations.summary: The revised toy-safety rules tighten limits on phthalates and bisphenols in toys intended for children. Products designed for users 14+ are not 'toys' for this purpose.
regulations.what_changed: The revised toy-safety rules tighten limits on phthalates and bisphenols in toys intended for children. Products designed for users 14+ are not 'toys' for this purpose.
required_actions: Re-test toy materials against the tighter chemical limits.
regulations.fines: National penalties apply; market access restrictions for non-compliance
regulations.scope_conditions: Applies to electronic toys intended for children (not 14+ STEM/maker products).

regulations.title: Sound-level limits for electronic toys
regulations.short_name: ToySafety — Sound-level limits for electronic toys
regulations.summary: Maximum sound-pressure limits are introduced for sound-emitting electronic toys.
regulations.what_changed: Maximum sound-pressure limits are introduced for sound-emitting electronic toys.
required_actions: Measure SPL of sound-emitting toys.
regulations.fines: National penalties apply; market access restrictions for non-compliance
regulations.scope_conditions: Applies to electronic toys intended for children.

regulations.title: MDR guidance: wellness vs. medical wearables
regulations.short_name: MDR — MDR guidance: wellness vs. medical weara
regulations.summary: New guidance clarifies when a body-worn device has a medical purpose and therefore falls under MDR (CE under MDR, clinical evidence). General fitness/activity trackers without a medical claim remain consumer products under GPSR.
regulations.what_changed: New guidance clarifies when a body-worn device has a medical purpose and therefore falls under MDR (CE under MDR, clinical evidence). General fitness/activity trackers without a medical claim remain consumer products under GPSR.
required_actions: Classify body-worn devices; route medical-purpose devices to MDR.
regulations.fines: National penalties apply; market access restrictions for non-compliance
regulations.scope_conditions: Applies to body-worn devices with a medical intended purpose.

regulations.title: POPs: lower limit for decaBDE flame retardant
regulations.short_name: POPs — POPs: lower limit for decaBDE flame reta
regulations.summary: The unintentional-trace concentration limit for decaBDE is lowered, affecting plastic housings and boards that still use it.
regulations.what_changed: The unintentional-trace concentration limit for decaBDE is lowered, affecting plastic housings and boards that still use it.
required_actions: Screen housings/boards for decaBDE; switch flame-retardant systems.
regulations.fines: National penalties apply; market access restrictions for non-compliance
regulations.scope_conditions: Applies to equipment containing decaBDE.

regulations.title: New Machinery Regulation safety requirements
regulations.short_name: Machinery — New Machinery Regulation safety requirem
regulations.summary: The new Machinery Regulation introduces requirements for products with moving parts and embedded software/AI, including consumer 3D printers and drones.
regulations.what_changed: The new Machinery Regulation introduces requirements for products with moving parts and embedded software/AI, including consumer 3D printers and drones.
required_actions: Re-assess machinery risk and documentation for in-scope products.
regulations.fines: National penalties apply; market access restrictions for non-compliance
regulations.scope_conditions: Applies to machinery such as 3D printers and drones on the EU market.

regulations.title: RoHS cadmium exemption review for photovoltaic equipment
regulations.short_name: RoHS — RoHS cadmium exemption review for photov
regulations.summary: The exemption allowing cadmium in certain photovoltaic devices is under review; PV inverter makers should track the outcome.
regulations.what_changed: The exemption allowing cadmium in certain photovoltaic devices is under review; PV inverter makers should track the outcome.
required_actions: Confirm cadmium content of PV equipment; monitor exemption status.
regulations.fines: National penalties apply; market access restrictions for non-compliance
regulations.scope_conditions: Applies to photovoltaic equipment containing cadmium.

regulations.title: REACH restriction on lead stabilisers in PVC articles
regulations.short_name: REACH — REACH restriction on lead stabilisers in
regulations.summary: Lead compounds used as stabilisers in PVC (including cable sheathing) are restricted above trace levels.
regulations.what_changed: Lead compounds used as stabilisers in PVC (including cable sheathing) are restricted above trace levels.
required_actions: Switch PVC cable compounds to lead-free stabilisers.
regulations.fines: National penalties apply; market access restrictions for non-compliance
regulations.scope_conditions: Applies to cables/articles with lead-stabilised PVC.

regulations.title: Battery labelling: capacity, CE and QR for portable batteries
regulations.short_name: Battery — Battery labelling: capacity, CE and QR f
regulations.summary: Batteries and battery-powered products must carry capacity, separate-collection and CE marking plus a QR code linking to battery information.
regulations.what_changed: Batteries and battery-powered products must carry capacity, separate-collection and CE marking plus a QR code linking to battery information.
required_actions: Add compliant battery labelling and QR codes.
regulations.fines: National penalties apply; market access restrictions for non-compliance
regulations.scope_conditions: Applies to products containing any battery.

regulations.title: GPSR: online-marketplace and distance-sales obligations
regulations.short_name: GPSR — GPSR: online-marketplace and distance-sa
regulations.summary: Additional information and recall-handling duties apply to consumer products sold online into the EU.
regulations.what_changed: Additional information and recall-handling duties apply to consumer products sold online into the EU.
required_actions: Update online product listings with required safety information.
regulations.fines: National penalties apply; market access restrictions for non-compliance
regulations.scope_conditions: Applies to consumer products (excludes medical and industrial-only).

regulations.title: France: repairability/durability index for displays, appliances and networking gear
regulations.short_name: WEEE — France: repairability/durability index f
regulations.summary: Products sold in France in the covered categories must display a repairability (moving to durability) index score at the point of sale.
regulations.what_changed: Products sold in France in the covered categories must display a repairability (moving to durability) index score at the point of sale.
required_actions: Calculate and display the French repairability/durability index.
regulations.fines: National penalties apply; market access restrictions for non-compliance
regulations.scope_conditions: Applies to displays, household appliances and networking equipment sold in France (FR).

regulations.title: Battery supply-chain due diligence for industrial/EV producers
regulations.short_name: Battery — Battery supply-chain due diligence for i
regulations.summary: Producers of industrial and EV batteries must operate a raw-materials supply-chain due-diligence policy (cobalt, lithium, nickel, natural graphite).
regulations.what_changed: Producers of industrial and EV batteries must operate a raw-materials supply-chain due-diligence policy (cobalt, lithium, nickel, natural graphite).
required_actions: Establish a battery raw-materials due-diligence policy.
regulations.fines: National penalties apply; market access restrictions for non-compliance
regulations.scope_conditions: Applies to industrial and EV battery producers.

regulations.title: Harmonised standard EN 18031 cited for RED cybersecurity
regulations.short_name: RED — Harmonised standard EN 18031 cited for R
regulations.summary: EN 18031-1/-2/-3 are cited in the Official Journal, giving presumption of conformity for the RED cybersecurity requirements on internet-connected radio equipment.
regulations.what_changed: EN 18031-1/-2/-3 are cited in the Official Journal, giving presumption of conformity for the RED cybersecurity requirements on internet-connected radio equipment.
required_actions: Use EN 18031 to demonstrate RED cybersecurity conformity.
regulations.fines: National penalties apply; market access restrictions for non-compliance
regulations.scope_conditions: Supports REG-26-015; same scope (internet-connected radio equipment).

regulations.title: RoHS Pack 4 phthalate limits reminder (DEHP, DBP, BBP)
regulations.short_name: RoHS — RoHS Pack 4 phthalate limits reminder (D
regulations.summary: Reminder that DEHP, DBP and BBP are restricted in EEE above 0.1%; enforcement focus on soft plastics and cabling.
regulations.what_changed: Reminder that DEHP, DBP and BBP are restricted in EEE above 0.1%; enforcement focus on soft plastics and cabling.
required_actions: Confirm phthalate content of soft plastics and cables.
regulations.fines: National penalties apply; market access restrictions for non-compliance
regulations.scope_conditions: Applies to EEE containing DEHP/DBP/BBP above threshold.

regulations.title: Energy label database update for light sources
regulations.short_name: EnergyLabel — Energy label database update for light s
regulations.summary: Light sources must have current EPREL registrations and rescaled labels; lighting placed on the market needs updated documentation.
regulations.what_changed: Light sources must have current EPREL registrations and rescaled labels; lighting placed on the market needs updated documentation.
required_actions: Update EPREL entries and labels for LED lighting.
regulations.fines: National penalties apply; market access restrictions for non-compliance
regulations.scope_conditions: Applies to LED lighting / light sources.

regulations.title: GPSR: recall and update obligations for products with embedded software
regulations.short_name: GPSR — GPSR: recall and update obligations for
regulations.summary: Connected consumer products with embedded software must support security updates and a clear recall pathway.
regulations.what_changed: Connected consumer products with embedded software must support security updates and a clear recall pathway.
required_actions: Document software-update and recall procedures for connected products.
regulations.fines: National penalties apply; market access restrictions for non-compliance
regulations.scope_conditions: Applies to internet-connected consumer products (excludes medical/industrial-only).
